import json, re

# Load the provided databases
with open('/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open('/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

snippet = "نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الْآخِرَةِ نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا"

def normalize(s):
    s = re.sub(r'[ًٌٍَُِّْـ]', '', s)  # remove tashkeel and tatweel
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', '', s)  # remove punctuation
    # unify alef/hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    return s

norm_snip = normalize(snippet)

candidates = []
for v in quran:
    ayah = v.get('ayah_text','')
    if not ayah:
        continue
    if norm_snip in normalize(ayah):
        candidates.append(ayah)

len(candidates), candidates[:5]

content.text: {"correction":"وَمَا كَانَ لِنَفْسٍ أَنْ تَمُوتَ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ كِتَابًا مُؤَجَّلًا ۗ وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الدُّنْيَا نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الْآخِرَةِ نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا ۚ وَسَنَجْزِي الشَّاكِرِينَ"}
